Why Choose Us

We make storage simple, secure, and affordable

24/7 CCTV & Electric Fencing

Your belongings are monitored around the clock with CCTV cameras and secure perimeter fencing.

Book & Pay Online Anytime

Our online platform lets you reserve, manage, and pay for your storage unit 24/7 from anywhere.

Flexible Monthly Payments

No long-term contracts. Choose monthly, quarterly, or annual terms with discounts up to 15%.

Central Jeffrey's Bay Location

Conveniently located on St Croix Street, easy to find and access. Drive-up units available.

What Our Customers Say

“Safe, clean, and affordable. The online booking made it so easy to reserve my unit. Highly recommend!”

— Sarah V., JBay

“I store my business inventory here. The drive-up access saves me so much time. Great service all around.”

— Mark T., St Francis

“Moved from a house to an apartment and needed overflow space. The medium unit was perfect — easy access and great security.”

— Linda K., Jeffreys Bay
